cuis-roadmap.description: Bootstrap clean Cuis env, audit, propose roadmap, and produce ordered changesets.
cuis-roadmap.template: Bootstrap a clean Cuis environment (prefer local repo artifacts; fallback to Docker if needed). Then audit the system and propose an ordered roadmap. If the user asked to proceed, execute the first roadmap item using Tidy First + TDD (TCR only if safe) and produce an ordered CoreUpdates changeset ready to send upstream. Always report: environment commands used, what changed, verification, and what was NOT verified.

cuis-council.description: Incremental exploration + Socratic debate to refine APIs/names and produce a prioritized roadmap.
cuis-council.template: Explore the repo incrementally (one slice). Identify 1-3 candidate improvements focused on API design, naming, protocols, and maintainability. For each candidate, run a Socratic debate using subagents: cuis-change-proponent, cuis-change-critic, cuis-change-moderator. Update the prioritized roadmap. If the user asks to implement one item, delegate to cuis-tcr-tdd-driver with a crisp objective and verification plan.

cuis-eject-pr.description: Loop headless: Tidy First + TDD, export native, open PR.
cuis-eject-pr.template: Run the loop protocol. TARGET is required and should be one of: Package:<name>, Class:<name>, Selector:<ClassName>>#selector. Prefer Docker + MCP headless. Export changes in the repo's native format (CoreUpdates .cs.st and/or Packages .pck.st). Produce a PR URL as final output.

cuis-rebuild-image.description: Rebuild Cuis image headless (Docker) and run tests.
cuis-rebuild-image.template: Rebuild the image using the CI-like Docker pipeline. Defaults: PLATFORM=linux/amd64, ARCH=amd64, OUTPUT=updated-image. Do not commit image binaries unless explicitly requested.
